name: cortex-cms
description: Cortex CMS - an open-source, AI-native headless content repository

scripts.infra:up: COMPOSE=$(command -v podman >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'podman compose' || echo 'docker compose') && $COMPOSE up -d
scripts.infra:down: COMPOSE=$(command -v podman >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'podman compose' || echo 'docker compose') && $COMPOSE down
scripts.infra:reset: COMPOSE=$(command -v podman >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'podman compose' || echo 'docker compose') && $COMPOSE down -v
scripts.infra:init: COMPOSE=$(command -v podman >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'podman compose' || echo 'docker compose') && $COMPOSE --profile init up
scripts.infra:logs: COMPOSE=$(command -v podman >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'podman compose' || echo 'docker compose') && $COMPOSE logs -f
scripts.infra:status: COMPOSE=$(command -v podman >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'podman compose' || echo 'docker compose') && $COMPOSE ps
scripts.infra:psql: COMPOSE=$(command -v podman >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'podman' || echo 'docker') && $COMPOSE exec -it cortex-postgres psql -U cortex -d cortex
scripts.infra:redis: COMPOSE=$(command -v podman >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'podman' || echo 'docker') && $COMPOSE exec -it cortex-redis redis-cli
